name: Petition for Lower Tip Allocation Rate

eligibility.description: Large food or beverage establishments where the actual tip rate is demonstrably lower than the 8% statutory default.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employers or a majority of employees can petition the IRS to reduce the 8% tip allocation rate to as low as 2% if the actual tipping rate is lower.
